channel.title: javascript on Rihards Kubilis
channel.description: Recent content in javascript on Rihards Kubilis

item.title: Hackerrank's JavaScript (Basic) Skills Certification Test
item.description: Today I decided to take a peek on Hackerrank’s JavaScript (Basic) Skills Certification Test and completed it. Now I have JavaScript (Basic) Certificate too. Looking forward for Intermediate skills test availability. I am quite excited about the tasks in the test, because I had the opportunity to use JavaScript’s built-in data structures.
